name: Quad9

pricing.details: Free. Operated by Quad9 Foundation, a non-profit incorporated in Switzerland.

description: Non-profit DNS resolver operated from Switzerland with no-logging policy and automatic malicious domain blocking using threat intelligence feeds.
rationale: Quad9 is operated by a Swiss non-profit, providing favorable jurisdictional protections. The no-logs policy means query data is not retained after the resolver cache TTL. Threat blocking uses aggregated intelligence feeds to block known malicious domains at the resolver level, adding a security layer without content filtering. No analytics dashboard is available, which is a usability trade-off relative to NextDNS. Encrypted DNS (DoH/DoT) is supported on both 9.9.9.9 and 149.112.112.112 resolver addresses.
